news.headline: Airtrunk, owned by Blackstone, considers ABS bonds for Asian expansion as part of its growth strategy.
SEC withdraws appeal in case on crypto broker-dealer rules after a loss; move seen as risky for DeFi platforms.
news.summary: The Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) has decided to drop its court appeal regarding a case it lost in the previous year. This case aimed to broaden the definition of a dealer, a move that was perceived as a significant risk to decentralized finance platforms. The decision to withdraw the appeal indicates a shift in regulatory approach in the crypto space.

news.headline: NaviFUS Corp. in Taiwan uses chip tech to improve brain disorder treatments through ultrasound solutions, integrating ICT capabilities.
news.summary: In Taipei on February 20, 2025, NaviFUS Corp. is leading a revolutionary shift in brain disorder treatments by utilizing ultrasound technology and Taiwan's cutting-edge chip technology. This integration of ICT into advanced medical devices by NaviFUS elevates signal processing to new levels, allowing for more effective treatments.

news.headline: Lenovo Group Q3 2024/25 results show 20% revenue growth to US$18.8 billion and net income doubling to US$693 million.
news.summary: Lenovo Group Limited (HKSE: 992) (ADR: LNVGY) and its subsidiaries revealed their Q3 fiscal year 2024/25 results today. The Group witnessed notable growth in revenue and profit, with revenue spiking by 20% year-on-year to US$18.8 billion. This marks the third consecutive quarter of achieving double-digit growth. Net income also saw a substantial increase, more than doubling to US$693 million compared to the previous year. It is important to note that this figure includes a non-recurring income tax credit of US$282 million.

news.headline: DeFi CEO expects a powerful summer with DeFi forecasted to surge in September, offering more entry points for users.
news.summary: The CEO of the dYdX Foundation, Charles d’Haussy, has forecasted a significant growth in the decentralized finance (DeFi) sector starting in September. He anticipates that the DeFi industry will experience a surge, offering more avenues for new users to enter than in the past. This projection suggests that opportunities in DeFi are expected to expand, potentially leading to a considerable increase in participation and investment. This optimistic outlook indicates a promising outlook for the DeFi market in the upcoming months.

news.headline: Cryptocurrency market sees sharp decline, with Bitcoin (BTC) and altcoins facing major losses. Investors sell amid volatility.
news.summary: The cryptocurrency market has recently seen a drastic decline, resulting in notable losses for both Bitcoin (BTC) and alternative coins. Investors are choosing to sell and secure their losses as the market continues to be highly unpredictable.

news.headline: HKMA to hold tender for HK$1.2 billion 2-year Exchange Fund Notes on Feb 21, 2025, at 3.34% interest rate.
news.summary: On February 21, 2025, the Hong Kong Monetary Authority (HKMA) revealed a tender for 2-year Exchange Fund Notes. The offering comprises HK$1,200 million at an annual interest rate of 3.34%.

news.headline: Conflux Network adjusts key parameters after 14th vote, raising PoW block rewards and interest rates.
news.summary: The Conflux (CFX) Network has recently made significant changes to its key parameters after wrapping up its 14th voting round. These changes entail a rise in PoW block rewards and interest rates. For further details on this development, please check out the full article.

news.headline: Enhanced by AI, Telegram adds sticker search, video timestamp links, and channel features for better user experience.
news.summary: In its most recent update, Telegram has rolled out several new features to enhance user experience. These include an AI-powered sticker search function, video timestamp links, and improvements to channel features. The update is geared towards boosting user engagement and facilitating content discovery on the platform. With these additions, Telegram users can now enjoy a more streamlined and efficient experience while interacting and sharing content.

news.headline: Robinhood (HOOD) reports 115% revenue growth in Q4 2024 due to crypto trading boost and expansions.
news.summary: In the fourth quarter of 2024, Robinhood experienced substantial growth as its revenues increased by 115% compared to the previous year. This growth was primarily fueled by a surge in cryptocurrency trading activities and strategic expansions undertaken by the company.

news.headline: BNB Chain introduces 'BNB My Valentine' with NFT rewards, celebrating Valentine's Day with crypto fans worldwide.
news.summary: BNB Chain has kicked off the 'BNB My Valentine' initiative, which presents a chance for crypto enthusiasts worldwide to partake in celebrations for Valentine's Day. The campaign features unique Non-Fungible Token (NFT) rewards and prizes for participants. This campaign is designed to engage the community and build excitement surrounding the holiday.

news.headline: NVIDIA's NeMo Framework uses model pruning and distillation for efficient language models, lowering costs while maintaining performance.
news.summary: Learn more about how NVIDIA's NeMo Framework uses techniques like model pruning and knowledge distillation to develop efficient language models. This approach significantly decreases computational expenses and energy usage, all without sacrificing performance. Discover how this innovative strategy is reshaping the landscape of language model development.

news.headline: Chainalysis unveils Asset Seizure Certification to help law enforcement seize crypto assets in combating financial crimes.
news.summary: Chainalysis has launched the Asset Seizure Certification program aimed at providing law enforcement agents with the necessary expertise to seize cryptocurrency assets. This initiative is in response to the growing challenges posed by modern financial crimes. The certification program equips participants with skills to effectively handle the seizure of crypto assets. This move is significant in empowering authorities to combat illicit activities involving digital currencies.

news.headline: New DeepSeek-R1 boosts GPU kernel generation with inference time scaling. It optimizes AI model performance with efficient resource management during inference.
news.summary: The DeepSeek-R1 model by NVIDIA utilizes inference-time scaling to enhance GPU kernel generation, enhancing the performance of AI models by effectively handling computational resources during inference. This technology aims to improve efficiency and optimize performance, ultimately leading to better results.

news.headline: Join the Sui Overflow 2025 Hackathon! Register now for this eight-week event to work on blockchain projects. Open to global innovators.
news.summary: The Sui Overflow 2025 is welcoming participants to join its top-tier international hackathon, aimed at promoting creativity in blockchain technology. Interested teams and individuals are encouraged to sign up for the eight-week event, which will center on developing groundbreaking blockchain projects.

news.headline: NVIDIA's CEO, Jensen Huang, recognized at Precision Medicine World Conference for AI role in healthcare.
news.summary: NVIDIA's CEO Jensen Huang was honored at the Precision Medicine World Conference for his remarkable contributions to advancing artificial intelligence and accelerated computing within the healthcare sector. This recognition underscores his pivotal role in driving innovation and progress in this field. The conference highlighted the critical importance of integrating AI and accelerated computing to revolutionize healthcare practices. This achievement emphasizes the significant impact of Huang's work, which has led to substantial advancements in the industry.

news.headline: Discover how AI's scaling laws - pretraining, post-training, and test-time scaling - boost model performance, driving accelerated computing demand. Learn more.
news.summary: Discover how the application of AI scaling laws, which encompass pretraining, post-training, and test-time scaling, can significantly boost the effectiveness and sophistication of AI models. This in turn has led to a surge in the need for accelerated computing. To learn more about this topic, click the link provided.

news.headline: GitHub faced three issues in Jan 2025, resulting in service disruptions due to deployment, config changes, and hardware failures.
news.summary: In January 2025, GitHub encountered a total of three incidents that resulted in disruptions in their services. These disruptions were attributed to issues related to deployment, configuration changes, and hardware failures as per the availability report provided by GitHub.

news.headline: AI Assistant by Klarna, aided by LangGraph and LangSmith, boosts customer support, cutting resolution time by 80% for 85M+ users.
news.summary: Klarna's AI Assistant, which operates using LangGraph and LangSmith technology, has significantly improved customer support by cutting query resolution time by 80% for more than 85 million users.

news.headline: MARA Holdings schedules conference call on Feb 26, 2025, to review Q4 and fiscal year 2024 financials. Register to attend.
news.summary: On February 26, 2025, MARA Holdings is scheduled to hold a conference call to review its financial performance for Q4 and fiscal year 2024. Shareholders are encouraged to sign up to join the call and can also submit inquiries in advance.

news.headline: Technovation is shaping AI education, empowering girls globally, sponsored by Tara Chklovski and Anshita Saini.
news.summary: Technovation is leading the charge in promoting inclusive AI education worldwide, enabling young women to address actual issues through technology. This initiative, spearheaded by Tara Chklovski and Anshita Saini, is making a significant impact, with a growing number of participants engaging in real-world problem-solving.

news.headline: US stocks set for mixed start after higher inflation print. S&P 500 and Dow down, Nasdaq 100 and Russell 2000 up. 10-year Treasury yield at 4.61%, 2-year at 4.34%. Futures: Nasdaq 100 +0.11%, S&P 500 -0.03%, Dow Jones -0.01%, Russell 2000 +0.30%.Indices: Dow -0.50% at 44,368.56, S&P 500 -0.27% at 6,051.97, Nasdaq +0.031% at 19,649.95, Russell 2000 -0.87% at 2,255.89.
news.summary: U.S. stock futures were mixed with the S&P 500 and Dow Jones declining, while the Nasdaq 100 and Russell 2000 were up after a higher-than-expected January inflation rate of 3% year-over-year and 0.5% monthly. Traders are awaiting the producer price index data for January before the market opens. The 10-year Treasury yield is at 4.61% and the two-year yield is at 4.34%. The Federal Reserve is likely to keep interest rates unchanged with a 97.5% probability in the March meeting. In the previous session, the Dow fell 225 points to 44,368.56, the S&P 500 was down 0.27% closing at 6,051.97, and the Nasdaq Composite was slightly up at 19,649.95. Notable movements included CVS Health Corp surging 15% and Tesla rebounding over 2%. Materials, energy, and real estate sectors led losses, while consumer staples and communication services advanced. Amazon and Alphabet fell, while Tesla rebounded and CVS Health Corp surged.

news.headline: Thailand boosts rice market aid post farmers' protest over low prices; Response to ensure financial stability.
Yen hits highest level against dollar in 2021 on speculation of BOJ rate hike.
Collaboration with NVIDIA Modulus revolutionizes flood forecasting, boosting real-time models for risk mitigation. #AI #BRLi #ToulouseINP
news.summary: BRLi and Toulouse INP have utilized NVIDIA Modulus to develop artificial intelligence-powered flood models, resulting in a remarkable improvement in real-time flood prediction and risk reduction. This collaboration has allowed for the integration of advanced technologies to enhance the accuracy of flood forecasts, ultimately leading to more effective mitigation strategies.

news.headline: KKR secures majority stake in $4.4B Fuji Soft following conflict with Bain.
IOTA starts program for businesses to build on Rebased Mainnet, providing funding and resources for real-world applications.
news.summary: The IOTA Foundation has launched a fresh program to aid companies in creating practical applications on the IOTA Rebased Mainnet. The initiative provides financial assistance and resources for groundbreaking projects in order to encourage development on the platform.

news.headline: US Producer Price Index rises to 3.5% in January, exceeding forecast of 3.2%. Fed interest rate cuts may be affected.
news.summary: In January 2025, U.S. producers faced increasing price pressures, sparking concerns about potential impacts on businesses and consumers. The Producer Price Index (PPI) rose by 3.5% year over year, surpassing the 3.2% forecast and marking the highest annual reading since February 2023. The monthly PPI increase was 0.4%, lower than December's 0.5% but above the expected 0.3%. This trend indicates persistent inflationary pressures, with the PPI showing the fourth consecutive increase in the headline index. The latest figures suggest that the Federal Reserve may reconsider interest rate cuts due to the growing inflation concerns.

news.headline: Pilbara miner expects surge in lithium demand as Chinese mine reopens - source familiar.
Beyond acquires rights to Buy Buy Baby brand, bringing it back together with Bed Bath & Beyond. #merger #retail
Trump's spending freeze causes chaos, putting tens of thousands of programs at risk and alarming supporters of various sectors.
news.summary: Concerned advocates for various initiatives including climate, infrastructure, mortgage, technology, health, and veterans' programs are anxious as they fear that a significant number of programs, totaling tens of thousands, may be in jeopardy.

news.headline: Trade chief at the White House plans on transforming economy under Trump's leadership.
Rep. Adrian Smith stresses on the US adopting a proactive approach on tariffs. #AdrianSmith #tariffs
Duke Robotics to launch a European subsidiary to boost global sales of its IC Drone after successful launch.
news.summary: In pursuit of expanding operations in the utility maintenance sector, a new subsidiary has been established after the prosperous commercial debut of Duke’s IC Drone. This move comes as part of the strategy to bolster international growth. The IC Drone, known for its innovative features, has received commendable reception and is a key player in the sector. The establishment of the new subsidiary aligns with the company's objective to tap into global markets. This development signifies a milestone in Duke's journey, indicating a shift towards broader horizons. The subsidiary's establishment is seen as a crucial step in the company's overarching plan.

news.headline: Joint Corp. reports 9% growth in adjustments performed in 2024 compared to 2023, with majority of corporate portfolio receiving Letters of Intent in early January 2025.
news.summary: In 2024, there was a 9% increase in the number of adjustments made compared to the previous year, 2023. By early January 2025, letters of intent were received for most of the corporate portfolio.

news.headline: Viper Networks rebrands as 0Wire, splitting assets into 0Wire Communications and 0Wire Hosting. New subsidiary 0Wire Wholesale aims for growth, targeting 5G services. 0Wire Energy for smart city projects in US & Sri Lanka.
news.summary: TROY, Michigan, on January 20, 2025, Viper Networks (OTCPK: VPER) revealed a strategic rebranding initiative with significant changes. The company, alongside its subsidiaries, will be rebranded as 0Wire (pronounced “Zero-Wire”). Assets from 1stPoint Communications will be divided into two operational firms. The current entity will become 0Wire Communications, managing the company’s key telecommunications assets in the US and the Eastern Caribbean. A new entity called 0Wire Hosting will oversee the technology hosting portfolio. 0Wire Wholesale, a new subsidiary, will redirect its focus to modern and high-growth opportunities like 5G roaming and messaging while advancing the wholesale voice market. Furthermore, additional subsidiaries will operate as 0Wire Energy, concentrating on smart city and renewable energy ventures in the US and Sri Lanka.

news.headline: UXUY is now the largest Telegram Wallet with 7.8M monthly active users, 1.4M in Social Trading. Introduced AI Agent for empowerment.
news.summary: The Telegram wallet offered by UXUY (@UXUYbot) has seen a significant increase in users, now exceeding 7.8 million monthly active users. A noteworthy portion of these users, totaling over 1.4 million, are actively engaged in the Social Trading platform.

news.headline: Major financial institutions are now engaging in debanking, a move that signals a significant shift in the industry.
Higher Images marks 25 years of supporting small businesses, names Linda Jo Thornberg as new president, sets new goals for 2025.
news.summary: Linda Jo Thornberg has been appointed as the President of Higher Images. Thornberg will be taking on the role of president to lead the company towards its goals. With this announcement, Higher Images is looking forward to benefiting from Thornberg’s expertise and experience. Thornberg's new position as president will see her overseeing the operations and strategic direction of the company. Her appointment marks a significant change for Higher Images as they continue to grow and expand their services under her leadership.

news.headline: Seeking interest for loan debenture issuance in financial innovations. Submit expressions now. #finance #debentures
A financial policy battle could return in 2025, involving President Trump; unresolved from last Congress.
news.summary: In 2025, a significant financial policy debate from the previous Congress is set to resurface, with the addition of a new factor, President Donald Trump. This unresolved battle involves key financial issues that are yet to be determined.

news.headline: Phoenix Capital Group changes name to Phoenix Energy, highlighting growth and innovation. Irvine-based firm now known as Phoenix Energy, advancing from mining to energy operations.
news.summary: On January 27, 2025, in Irvine, California, Phoenix Capital Group Holdings, LLC underwent a significant change by renaming itself as Phoenix Energy One, LLC, now known as Phoenix Energy. This alteration signifies the company's evolution from a mineral rights acquisition startup to a comprehensive energy entity encompassing mineral rights, non-operating working interests, and active operations. The rebranding to Phoenix Energy mirrors the company's widened scope, technological progress, and resolute dedication to meeting future energy demands.

news.headline: PPI inflation remains steady, S&P 500 rises; airfares hinder rally. Core prices flat last month. Tomorrow's CPI awaited. (Characters: 124)
news.summary: The latest producer price index revealed that core prices remained stagnant in the previous month, which bolstered the S&P 500. This positive trend comes right before the upcoming release of the consumer price index tomorrow, amidst concerns surrounding Trump's tariffs. While the PPI indicated low inflation levels, the S&P 500 was impacted by a downturn in airfares. This information was not sourced from Investor's Business Daily.

news.headline: Employers in the U.S. added 143,000 jobs in January, with unemployment rate at 4% and hourly earnings increasing.
news.summary: In the United States, approximately 143,000 jobs were added by employers last month, slightly below expectations. The unemployment rate decreased to 4%, and there was an increase in hourly earnings.

news.headline: Dow Jones Futures drop due to new tariffs by Trump. Nvidia faces crucial test. Fed Chairman Powell testifies.
news.summary: Stocks in the technology sector saw a notable surge on Monday as Nvidia's shares reached a crucial point. Federal Reserve Chairman Jerome Powell is scheduled to give testimony to Congress. Dow Jones futures experienced a decline as President Trump announced new tariffs. Nvidia is currently facing a significant test at a key level. The tech company's stock rallied to this critical point amidst the broader market fluctuations.

news.headline: Norsk Hydro issued EUR 500 million green bonds with 7-year tenor and 3.625% fixed coupon rate.
news.summary: Norsk Hydro ASA has effectively released EUR 500 million in senior unsecured green bonds through its Euro Medium Term Note (EMTN) Programme. This fresh bond, which spans over 7 years, features a steady annual coupon of 3.625 percent (3.649 percent reoffer yield).

news.headline: President Trump aims to lower prices. Will he succeed?
news.summary: The government reported that the unemployment rate has dropped to 4.5%, marking a decrease of 0.3% from the previous month. This decrease brought the total number of unemployed individuals down to 7.2 million. Additionally, the economy added 250,000 new jobs in various sectors, including manufacturing, healthcare, and finance. The labor force participation rate also increased slightly to 61.8%. These positive indicators suggest a growing economy and job market recovery.

news.headline: Fed may extend interest rate pause due to job market strength. Uncertain about further rate cuts after pausing last month.
news.summary: The main bank is currently considering the speed at which it should reduce interest rates following a halt in cuts the previous month.

news.headline: Fed chief Powell concerned about policy uncertainty under Trump affecting Federal Reserve rate outlook.
news.summary: Jerome Powell, the Federal Reserve chief, has expressed concerns about the uncertainty in policy under the Trump administration affecting the Federal Reserve's interest rate predictions. This uncertainty has raised questions about the future economic outlook. The Trump economy and the Federal Reserve rate forecast are currently being analyzed across four potential scenarios. Powell's remarks suggest that the government's policy decisions could impact the direction of interest rates and overall economic stability. This discussion surrounding the Trump economy and its implications on the Federal Reserve rate outlook are critical in assessing the current economic landscape.

news.headline: Dow Jones falls due to new Trump tariffs, Nvidia stock at key level. Fed Chair Powell's testimony up next.
news.summary: On Tuesday, the Dow Jones Industrial Average experienced a decline due to the announcement of new tariffs by President Donald Trump. Nvidia's stock has reached a critical level that investors should keep an eye on. The next event to watch is the testimony of Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell. This news was reported by Investor's Business Daily.
